title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Godrej Interio - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
